ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "partner" TEXT /* Whether the customer has a partner */,
  "dependents" TEXT /* Whether the customer has dependents */,
  "phone_service" TEXT /* Whether the customer has phone service */,
  "multiple_lines" TEXT /* Whether the customer has multiple lines */,
  "internet_service" TEXT /* Type of internet service the customer has */,
  "online_security" TEXT /* Whether the customer has online security */,
  "online_backup" TEXT /* Whether the customer has online backup */,
  "device_protection" TEXT /* Whether the customer has device protection */,
  "tech_support" TEXT /* Whether the customer has tech support */,
  "streaming_tv" TEXT /* Whether the customer has streaming TV */,
  "streaming_movies" TEXT /* Whether the customer has streaming movies */,
  "contract" TEXT /* Type of contract the customer has */,
  "paperless_billing" TEXT /* Whether the customer has paperless billing */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method of the customer */,
  "churn" TEXT /* Whether the customer has churned */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the customer */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last customer interaction */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount the customer has spent */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., Phone, Internet, TV) */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of the service (e.g., Basic, Premium) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  "active" TEXT /* Whether the service is currently active (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of the contract (e.g., Month-to-month, One year, Two year) */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in months */,
  "early_termination_fee" REAL /* Fee for early termination of the contract */,
  "renewal_option" TEXT /* Whether the contract can be renewed automatically */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Electronic check, Mailed check, Bank transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the payment method */,
  "active" TEXT /* Whether the payment method is currently active (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_services" (
  "customer_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer service */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the service */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the service subscription (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment for the service */,
  "next_billing_date" TEXT /* Date of the next billing cycle */,
  "total_charges" REAL /* Total charges for the service subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference information for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churn_analysis" (
  "churn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each churn analysis */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "churn_date" TEXT /* Date the customer churned */,
  "churn_reason" TEXT /* Reason for churning */,
  "churn_type" TEXT /* Type of churn (e.g., Voluntary, Involuntary) */,
  "follow_up_required" TEXT /* Whether a follow-up is needed (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Outcome of the churn analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("churn_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Customer Service, Sales, Admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., Basic, Advanced, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., Login, Logout, View, Edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Time the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Create, Update, Delete) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module where the action was performed (e.g., Customers, Services, Payments) */,
  "affected_rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows affected by the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
